leaderboard.title: Speaking Clubs Leaderboard
leaderboard.name: Name
leaderboard.monthNotOccurred: This month hasn't occurred yet. The leaderboard will be available once the month begins.
leaderboard.footer: 🌟 Keep learning, keep speaking, keep improving! Your dedication inspires us all.

schedule.title: Session Schedule
schedule.subtitle: View and manage your speaking club sessions

instructions.pointSystemSubtitle: Earn points through participation and achievements in your speaking club sessions.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.description: Earn 1 point for attending each session

activeSpeaking.title: Active Speaking
activeSpeaking.description: Earn 1 point for actively participating and speaking during discussions

winningActivity.title: Winning Activity
winningActivity.description: Earn 2 points for winning games, competitions, or performing exceptionally

bringingFriend.title: Bringing a Friend
bringingFriend.description: Earn 1 point for bringing a new friend to join the club

instructions.monthlyPrizesSubtitle: At the end of each month, the top 3 participants from each club receive awards.

firstPlace.title: 1st Place
firstPlace.prize: Prize: Business lunch with Temurbek Adhamov (Founder of Najot Talim)
firstPlace.description: One winner per club (4 clubs = 4 winners total across main clubs)

secondPlace.title: 2nd Place
secondPlace.prize: Prize: Free Mock HR Interview (Value: 600,000 soums)
secondPlace.description: One winner per club (4 clubs = 4 winners total across main clubs)

thirdPlace.title: 3rd Place
thirdPlace.prize: Prize: Free Mock Technical Interview from IT Professional
thirdPlace.description: One winner per club (4 clubs = 4 winners total across main clubs)

pointsReset.title: Important: Points Reset
pointsReset.description: When top 3 participants from each club receive their monthly awards, all their accumulated points are reset to 0. This ensures a fair competition for everyone each month.
pointsReset.example: Example: If you finish in 1st, 2nd, or 3rd place in March and receive your prize, your points will be reset to 0 starting in April, giving you a fresh start for the new month.

meta.title: Speaking Clubs Leaderboard
meta.description: Track your progress in language speaking clubs and compete with friends!
